criteria.description: Edges are owned by WPState.allowed_targets(), with no hand-maintained production transition table.
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/status/test_wp_state.py::TestTransitionMatrixEquivalence and ::TestFsmIsSoleEdgeAuthority; pytest tests/status tests/specify_cli/status tests/unit/status tests/specify_cli/lanes/test_recovery.py -> 2811 passed.
criteria.notes: WP01 approved; final patch removed the vestigial guard-only WPState.transition().

criteria.description: The runtime FSM API is current_lane, may_transition_to(target), and transition_to(target, ctx).
criteria.evidence: validate_transition now delegates through wp_state_for(from).transition_to(to, ctx); tests/specify_cli/status/test_wp_state.py pins transition_to, current_lane, and may_transition_to usage.
criteria.notes: No remaining WPState.transition() callers in src/specify_cli/status or FSM tests.

criteria.description: Historical nine-lane transition and guard behavior is preserved.
criteria.evidence: tests/status/test_transitions.py behavior-preservation parity plus tests/specify_cli/status/test_wp_state.py -> 1898 passed; expanded status suite -> 2811 passed.
criteria.notes: InvalidTransitionError.reason preserves the parity diagnostic returned by validate_transition.

criteria.description: Lane.GENESIS is a valid non-display lane and is excluded from canonical board lanes.
criteria.evidence: tests/status/test_emit.py::TestDeriveFromLane::test_no_events_returns_genesis; tests/status/test_bootstrap.py; tests/specify_cli/status/test_wp_state.py state/property coverage.
criteria.notes: WP01/WP03 approvals record genesis as first-class but non-display.

criteria.description: Unseeded WPs derive from genesis and bootstrap emits explicit genesis -> planned seeds.
criteria.evidence: tests/status/test_emit.py::TestDeriveFromLane and tests/status/test_bootstrap.py passed in the expanded status suite.
criteria.notes: Mission status events contain genesis -> planned seed rows for WP01-WP06.

criteria.description: Finalize does not clobber the coordination event log.
criteria.evidence: WP05 approved with e2e finalize-clobber regression; reviewer note: non-vacuity proven and realism confirmed.
criteria.notes: Status CLI reports WP05 done.

criteria.description: Genesis is excluded from materialized snapshot summaries.
criteria.evidence: WP03 approved; expanded status suite includes reducer/view coverage and genesis non-display tests.
criteria.notes: Reviewer recorded invariant complete across FR-007/FR-013/FR-014.

criteria.description: Read-side defaults report unseeded WPs as genesis.
criteria.evidence: WP02 approved; tests/status/test_emit.py derives genesis for no events and unknown WPs; aggregate tests now reject empty/unknown WP transitions from genesis.
criteria.notes: Stale planned-default tests were corrected in the final patch.

criteria.description: Implementing an unfinalized WP fails before workspace allocation with an actionable finalize-tasks message.
criteria.evidence: WP02 approval states FR-009 fail-fast verified; status regression suite covers unseeded genesis rejection.
criteria.notes: No workspace allocation bypass is accepted for genesis WPs.

criteria.description: Genesis seed fan-out to SaaS is contract-valid when the events package supports genesis.
criteria.evidence: tests/status/test_emit.py::TestGenesisSaasFanOutCompatibilityGate passed; WP04 approved with explicit capability gate and events PR noted.
criteria.notes: Gate preserves compatibility before and after the spec_kitty_events genesis enum release.

criteria.description: SaaS WPStatusChanged lane validation is single-sourced.
criteria.evidence: WP04 approval records T021 single-sourced lane validator; status fan-out compatibility tests passed.
criteria.notes: No hardcoded parallel nine-lane SaaS validator remains for the changed path.

criteria.description: WPState owns guards and force override; validate_transition is a thin transition_to delegator.
criteria.evidence: tests/status/test_transitions.py terminal force and parity coverage; tests/specify_cli/status/test_wp_state.py guard equivalence; final patch routes validate_transition through transition_to.
criteria.notes: No edge, guard, or force logic remains in transitions.py.

criteria.description: Discovery and task status surfaces hide genesis without dropping genesis WPs.
criteria.evidence: WP03 approved; expanded status suite includes task/status and discovery-adjacent status coverage.
criteria.notes: Genesis remains non-display while still fail-closed in write paths.

criteria.description: Frontmatter validation does not offer genesis as an authorable lane.
criteria.evidence: WP03 approval covers FR-014; terminology and status architectural gates passed.
criteria.notes: Genesis is runtime/bootstrap state only, not authorable task metadata.

criteria.description: Canonical event validation accepts genesis only as from_lane, never as to_lane.
criteria.evidence: WP01 approval records genesis from_lane-only validation; tests/architectural/test_status_module_boundary.py passed.
criteria.notes: validate.py routes edge legality through the FSM.

criteria.description: Duplicated seed helpers are consolidated to no more than two shared fixtures.
criteria.evidence: WP06 approval records 12 -> 1 seed helper as a genuine reduction; reviewer accepted Randy+Paula leanness lenses.
criteria.notes: WP06 status is done.

criteria.description: FSM API is load-bearing through real callers.
criteria.evidence: WP06 approval records FSM API locked in with real callers; final patch makes validate_transition use transition_to directly.
criteria.notes: current_lane, may_transition_to, and transition_to are retained and exercised.

criteria.description: Stale docstrings/comments are corrected and tautological count tests are annotated.
criteria.evidence: WP06 approval records bootstrap force dropped, stale comments fixed, and tautological test annotated; final patch updates transition_to documentation.
criteria.notes: No new terminology violations in tests/architectural/test_no_legacy_terminology.py.

criteria.description: Finalize clobber regression is covered end-to-end.
criteria.evidence: WP05 approved; e2e finalize-clobber test was reviewed as realistic and non-vacuous.
criteria.notes: Coordination event log preservation is explicitly verified.

criteria.description: Bootstrap no longer records redundant force=true for guard-free genesis -> planned seeds.
criteria.evidence: WP06 approval records bootstrap force dropped and proven; status bootstrap tests passed.
criteria.notes: Bootstrap seed remains explicit without redundant force.

criteria.description: ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS is not a parallel production authority.
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/status/test_wp_state.py::TestFsmIsSoleEdgeAuthority checks no production membership gate on ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS.
criteria.notes: ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS remains only a derived projection for tests/graph tooling.

criteria.description: State objects own both edge graph and act of transitioning.
criteria.evidence: validate_transition delegates through WPState.transition_to; tests/status/test_transitions.py and tests/specify_cli/status/test_wp_state.py pass across edge, guard, force, and parity cases.
criteria.notes: Final patch removed the redundant guard-only transition() method.
